creator: marc@pc02.labcontrol.com
text:
The entries in /usr/local/info/dir for the info file from
        a2ps-A4-4.9.8 are not syntactically correct

Fix: 

simple correction in the installation of the port
How-To-Repeat: 
	install a2ps
	start info viewer 
        try to browse the two entries for a2ps
